$comment: Per-series harvest lists for the Harvest tab. Checkbox state lives in the per-dinner Firestore doc (state.harvest). Updated 2026-07-05 for Sam's portal order (items coming down to SF pulled off). Updated 2026-07-09: Course 1 swapped from charred summer vegetables to Snow Goose stone fruit + Kelly's salanova, so the char veg (eggplant, squash, cabbage, onions, farm peppers) came off the pick list and mixed salanova greens went on. Stone fruit is bought from Snow Goose (Sam grabs), not a farm pick.

weekends.label: July 11-12
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Course 1 swapped to Snow Goose stone fruit (7/9) — Sam grabs that. Everything for the restaurant already came down Monday. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Squash blossoms
items.note: stuffed-blossom bite · pick morning-of, they wilt fast · Snow Goose covers any shortfall

items.name: Mixed garden greens
items.note: Course 1 — over the stracciatella with the stone fruit · whatever lettuce is at its peak (Kelly, beautiful right now) (NEW 7/9)

items.name: Walla Walla onions
items.note: Course 3 contorni · coal-roasted whole, shared family-style

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: farm-side garnish (Course 1, dessert scatter, bites) · pasta-lamination flowers came down to SF

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: thyme (blossom bite), mint (pepper toast), garnish herbs · pasta-lamination herbs came down to SF

confirm.name: Guanciale (Tim)
confirm.note: coming down to SF — folded into the goat cheese filling at the restaurant. Not a farm pick.

confirm.name: Beef (Tim)
confirm.note: at SF — Sully brought ~11 lb + ~9 lb. Rubbed at SF, grilled over apple wood at the farm.

confirm.name: Chicken + duck eggs
confirm.note: already sent to SF for the pasta dough + the cured-yolk cure; confirm the count held

weekends.footnote: Course 1 is now stone fruit (peach/nectarine/plum/apricot) from Snow Goose — Sam grabs it, not a farm pick (menu swap 7/9; the summer-veg mix wasn't going to be ready). Coming down to the restaurant, do NOT pick fresh: green garlic (beef rub), tomato leaves (oil), lavender (honey), lemon verbena (cream), the pasta-lamination herbs & flowers, guanciale, and egg yolks.

weekends.label: July 18-19
weekends.intro: Only what needs picking fresh at the farm this weekend. Course 1 is Snow Goose stone fruit (Sam grabs). W2 shifts the dessert fruit to apricots. Sunday repeats Saturday.

items.name: Squash blossoms
items.note: stuffed-blossom bite · pick morning-of, they wilt fast

items.name: Mixed garden greens
items.note: Course 1 — over the stracciatella with the stone fruit · whatever lettuce is at its peak

items.note: Course 3 contorni · coal-roasted whole, shared family-style

items.name: Edible flowers
items.note: farm-side garnish (Course 1, dessert scatter, bites) · pasta-lamination flowers come down to SF

items.name: Tender herbs (garnish + bites)
items.note: thyme (blossom bite), mint (pepper toast), garnish herbs · pasta-lamination herbs come down to SF

confirm.name: Guanciale (Tim)
confirm.note: coming down to SF — folded into the goat cheese filling at the restaurant. Not a farm pick.

confirm.name: Beef (Tim)
confirm.note: at SF, rubbed at SF, grilled over apple wood at the farm. Confirm the cut held for the second weekend.

confirm.name: Apricots (bought)
confirm.note: dessert fruit shifts to apricots for W2 · bought, not farm
